title: gladiolus ferrugineus
intro: Gladiolus ferrugineus, also known as the Rusty Gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Gladiolus ferrugineus has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus ferrugineus can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
